creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I confirm this.

The update to release 2.32 was not complete, ja-JP disappeared from the distinfo list.

It does appear in the MASTER_SITES, so it seems to be an issue with distinfo file itself.

Adding Jan and Beat to the PR since they were directly involved with the 2.32 upgrade.  Like I said, I haven't tested it, but I think the fix is just add two lines back to distinfo.
